title: Selinum tordyliastrum
taxonomy: Selinum tordyliastrum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It belongs to the genus Selinum, which includes several other species of plants. The family Apiaceae is a large and diverse group of plants that includes many common species. Selinum tordyliastrum is native to the Mediterranean region and is found in countries such as Greece and Turkey. Further classification of Selinum tordyliastrum is detailed in the binomial nomenclature system, with the species being described as Selinum tordyliastrum.
